title: Stay refused pending appeal: BKG Transport Limited, Whiteparish Transport Limited and Terry Kevin Gover
body: "The Traffic Commissionre made orders to:   revoke the operator licence held by Whiteparish Transport Limited with effect from 23:59 on 24 August 2018 revoke the operator licence held by BKG Transport Limited with effect from 23:59 on 24 August 2018 disqualify Terry Kevin Gover from acting as transport manager under any operator’s licence for a period of 2 years and until he sits and passes the transport manager CPC qualification disqualify Terry Kevin Gover from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the transport operations of an entity that holds such a licence for a period of 2 years from 24 August 2018 disqualify Anthony Kenneth Gover from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the transport operations of an entity that holds such a licence for a period of 2 years from 24 August 2018 disqualify Whiteparish Transport Limited from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the transport operations of an entity that holds such a licence for a period of 2 years from 24 August 2018 disqualify BKG Transport Limited from holding or obtaining an operator’s licence or being involved in the transport operations of an entity that holds such a licence for a period of 2 years from 24 August 2018   The decision was made on 23 July 2018   BKG Transport Limited – stay refused by the Traffic Commissioner and Upper Tribunal pending appeal Whiteparish Transport Limited – stay refused by the Traffic Commissioner pending appeal  "
